Continue editing This document contains an XML Forms Office not supported by Office Editor. XFA was deprecated when the PDF 2.0 specification was released in 2015. The creator of the PDF can convert it to use AcroForms, which are supported. If appropriate, please contact your IT administrator for assistance. "This document contains redaction marks that have not yet been applied. Any content associated with these marks will still be present until they are applied. Are you sure you want to continue?" Use a different account Cancel Submit Password This website or application is requesting authentication. Username OK OKAY common name: Details You have been logged out. Unable to detect a network connection Your administrator has changed your TOS. You must login, and accept the TOS to continue. expires on: fingerprints: issued by: issued on:
issued to: No offline access "We couldn't detect a network connection." To log in, connect to a WiFi or mobile data network. organization name: organization unit: For your security you must disable screen dimmers or brightness correction applications to continue. Screen overlay detected serial number: sha 1: sha 256: View details The date of the certificate is invalid. The certificate has expired. Hostname mismatch. A generic error occurred. The certificate is not yet valid. The certificate authority is not trusted. You should not proceed, especially if you have never seen this warning before for this site. OAuthActivity Unable to connect We were unable to connect to your network. Check your network connection and try again. validity period: Failed to get categories Character limit exceeded %1$d of %2$d %1$d / %2$d Contact us Enter valid email address Enter your message Enter your full name android.supportv1.design.transformation.FabTransformationScrimBehavior android.supportv1.design.transformation.FabTransformationSheetBehavior No results for %1$s • %2$s See all articles See all %d articles android.supportv1.design.behavior.HideBottomViewOnScrollBehavior Remove %1$s No connection Show password @string/contact_us_title Unknown Going back will delete your message. Delivered Message failed. Tap to retry Name Delete message Retry sending This conversation has been closed. Last reply %s Write a message Retry Search Failed to get sections PRO About Complete action using Office Editor Authenticate Authentication Required. Please Authenticate. Authentication Cancelled Enter Device Screen Lock Device Screen Lock Required Set Common Name (CN) Country © Certificate Details Email Organisation (O) Organizational Unit (OU) Sign Verify Document digest failure Verification failed This signature is valid, but there have been changes made to the document since it was signed This signature is valid, and there have been no changes made to the document since it was signed This signature is not trusted Signature valid Document Signature Verification Signature warning Available Certificates The current data leakage policy prevents opening files from non-secure apps This file could not be opened Australia Canada China India Japan Korea New Zealand OK Singapore South Africa United Kingdom United States ACCEPT All ARRANGE As Eighths As Halves As Hundredths As Quarters As Sixteenths As Tenths Author AUTHOR SUM(first_cell:last_cell) Cancel "You can't change the extension from \"%1$s\" to \"%2$s\"." "Could not create temporary file %s Have storage permissions been granted?" "Review actions are not supported for Office 1997–2007 format documents. Please use Office on a desktop computer to convert the file to the newer format." Check your connection and try again. Connection Error content:// error Copy You cannot copy a file to itself. Please choose another name or location for the copy. Directories cannot be deleted. LAST PAGE Last Viewed Would you like to update the author name, or retain the current one? Loading, please wait. Sorry, you cannot access Google Drive. These permissions are necessary to choose your Google account. Would you like to try again? These permissions are necessary for Office Editor to open and save documents. Would you like to try again? //SmartRefreshLayout The content view in SmartRefreshLayout is empty. Do you forget to add it in xml layout file? Pull Down To Refresh Release To Refresh Refreshing… Wait For Loading… Refresh Success Refresh Failed \'Last Update\' M-d HH:mm Release To Second Floor Pull Up To Load More Release To Load More Loading… Wait For Refreshing… Load Success Load Failed No More Data %s falsify area,\n Represents the height[%.1fdp] of drag at run time,\n It does not show anything. //Toast Need Permission! Search for files… Please Wait…
// Tool Type Your PDF Merge PDF Split PDF Print Split PDF Compress PDF Share as photo Image to PDF Browse PDF Save as Image Lock PDF Unlock PDF You can select files from different folders on your devices Select multiple PDF files and merge them in seconds. Print PDF files quickly from your phone. Split a PDF file by page ranges or extract all PDF pages to multiple PDF files. Compress PDF files to reduce their size to meet your needs. Convert images (jpg, jpeg, png, etc.) to PDF files Export the specified pages of the PDF document as images Protect PDF documents by setting a password Show all your PDF created Remove PDF password security, giving you the freedom to use your PDFs as you want You can share 50 file once time! Share via
//Dialog Permission Required To read and edit documents on your device, please allow PDF Reader to access all your files. Allow access to manage all files Invalid password Enter password Set password Remove password The file will no longer be protected You need to enter the password to open it. Password Are you sure want to delete? This action cannot be undone Storage path Last modified Set file Name Rename Are you sure? Move out of Favorite
Recent list will be clear! Favorite list will be clear! Quit merging? The changes will not be saved. Are your sure you want to quit? Quit converting? Quit splitting? Move out of recent Are you sure you want to move the file(s) out of this folder? Jump to page Enter page number Invalid page number Same Name Failed to rename file Invalid characters (@, #, $…) The best we can get~ Rate Your 5-star rating is our best gift! Your approval helps spread the word and grow our product!
Yay! Thanks for your support! Oops… Seems like you got some problems while using our app. Do you want to exit ? Sort By Name Last modified File Size Order Ascending Descending * Go to set -> Click Permissions -> Turn on Storage permission "Save Document Document has changes. Save them?
